title: oreosedum villosum subsp. aristatum
intro: Oreosedum villosum subsp. aristatum, also known as woolly rock jasmine or hairy rock jasmine, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe sunburns, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Oreosedum villosum subsp. aristatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
